upsertContact.title: Upsert Contact
upsertContact.description: Sync Segment user profile details to Yonoma Contacts.

identifiers.label: Identifiers
identifiers.description: Unique identifiers for the contact. User ID and email are required. Anonymous ID is optional.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: Unique user identifier from your app.

anonymousId.label: Anonymous ID
anonymousId.description: Anonymous identifier from Segment for tracking pre-identified activity.

listId.label: List ID
listId.description: The Yonoma list to add the contact to.

status.label: Email subscription status
status.description: Indicates if the Contact is subscribed or unsubscribed from marketing emails. Set to true to subscribe, false to unsubscribe.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The timestamp of the event. Defaults to the current time if not provided.

ip.label: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the user. Defaults to the current user IP if not provided.

userAgent.label: User Agent
userAgent.description: The user agent of the user.

page.label: Page
page.description: The details of the page being viewed.

url.label: Page URL
url.description: Full URL of the page visited.

path.label: Page Path
path.description: Path of the page being viewed.

search.label: Search Query
search.description: Search query used to find the page.

campaign.label: Campaign
campaign.description: The marketing campaign that referred the user to the site.

source.label: UTM Campaign Source
source.description: Source of the campaign UTM parameter.

medium.label: UTM Campaign Medium
medium.description: Medium of the campaign UTM parameter.

term.label: UTM Campaign Term
term.description: Term or keyword of the campaign UTM parameter.

content.label: UTM Campaign Content
content.description: Content of the campaign UTM parameter.

location.label: Location
location.description: The geographic location of the user.

region.label: Region/State
region.description: Region or state of the user.

dateOfBirth.label: Date of Birth
dateOfBirth.description: Contact's date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD or ISO8601 format.

tags_to_add.label: Tags to Add
tags_to_add.description: List of tags to add to the Contact. Can be a single string or array of tags. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.

tags_to_remove.label: Tags to Remove
tags_to_remove.description: List of tags to remove from the Contact. Can be a single string or array of strings. Tags must already exist in Yonoma.

trackEvent.description: Capture behavioral events for both known and anonymous users to build a complete activity timeline in Yonoma.

event.label: Event Name
event.description: The name of the event to track.
